add-plain-text-to-pdf-page.title: Add Plain Text to a PDF Page using TextFragment
add-plain-text-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a TextFragment, set its position on the first page, and save the updated document.

insert-identical-text-on-all-pdf-pages.title: Insert Identical Text on All PDF Pages
insert-identical-text-on-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add the same plain text to every page of a PDF by iterating through the document's Pages collection and adding a TextFragment to each page's Paragraphs collection.

load-custom-ttf-from-memory-stream.title: Load Custom TrueType Font from Memory Stream and Apply to Text
load-custom-ttf-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font from a Base64‑encoded string via a MemoryStream, handling fallback to a system font, and applying the font to a TextFragment using TextState in an Aspose.PDF document.

apply-custom-otf-font-to-textfragment.title: Apply Custom OpenType Font to TextFragment
apply-custom-otf-font-to-textfragment.description: Demonstrates loading an OpenType (OTF) font, embedding it, and applying it to a TextFragment to create styled text in a PDF document.

set-character-spacing-in-pdf.title: Set Character Spacing for Text in PDF
set-character-spacing-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to adjust inter‑character gaps by setting the CharacterSpacing property on a TextState before adding a TextFragment to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

left-align-text-in-pdf.title: Left Align Text in PDF
left-align-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a text fragment to a PDF page and align it to the left margin using Aspose.Pdf's TextState.HorizontalAlignment property.

center-text-on-pdf-page.title: Center Text on PDF Page
center-text-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates adding a text fragment to a PDF and centering it horizontally by setting TextState.HorizontalAlignment to Center.

right-align-text-on-pdf-page.title: Right Align Text on PDF Page
right-align-text-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to right‑align a text fragment on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's TextState.HorizontalAlignment property.

add-multi-line-text-paragraph.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Paragraph to PDF Page
add-multi-line-text-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextParagraph, configure its layout, add multiple lines efficiently, and place it on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-clickable-hyperlink-into-pdf.title: Insert Clickable Hyperlink into PDF Text
insert-clickable-hyperlink-into-pdf.description: Shows how to create a TextSegment with a WebHyperlink, style it, and add it to a TextFragment on a PDF page using Aspose.PDF.

add-html-fragment-with-styling-to-pdf-pa.title: Add HTML Fragment with Styling to PDF Page
add-html-fragment-with-styling-to-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates how to insert an HTML fragment containing bold and italic markup into an existing PDF page and customize its appearance using TextState (font, size, color).

create-footnote-with-image.title: Create Footnote with Image in PDF
create-footnote-with-image.description: Demonstrates how to add a footnote to a PDF page and embed an in‑memory PNG image into the footnote's Paragraphs collection using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-footnote-to-pdf.title: Add Table Footnote to PDF Text
add-table-footnote-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a footnote that contains a table and attach it to a text fragment in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-formatted-endnote-into-pdf.title: Insert Formatted Endnote into PDF
insert-formatted-endnote-into-pdf.description: Shows how to add an endnote with bold and italic text formatting to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

inline-text-image-paragraph.title: Create Inline Text and Image in a PDF Paragraph
inline-text-image-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to combine a TextFragment and an Image fragment inline within a single paragraph to produce a mixed text‑image element in a PDF document.

add-invisible-tooltip-button-over-text.title: Add Invisible Tooltip Button Over Text in PDF
add-invisible-tooltip-button-over-text.description: Shows how to locate a specific text fragment in a PDF and place an invisible button field over it to act as a tooltip using Aspose.Pdf actions.

find-phrase-occurrences-in-pdf.title: Find Phrase Occurrences in PDF Using TextFragmentAbsorber
find-phrase-occurrences-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, search for a specific phrase on each page with TextFragmentAbsorber, and output the text and its location.

replace-text-in-pdf-preserve-formatting.title: Replace Text in PDF While Preserving Formatting
replace-text-in-pdf-preserve-formatting.description: Demonstrates how to search for a specific phrase in a PDF and replace it with new text while keeping the original font, size, color, and other formatting using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Header to All PDF Pages
add-header-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF document's pages and insert a header text fragment on each page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footer-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Footer Page Numbers to PDF
add-footer-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a footer with automatic page numbers on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark-to-p.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark-to-p.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent text watermark on every page of a PDF by using a WatermarkAnnotation with a TextState and setting its opacity.

rotate-text-in-pdf.title: Rotate Text in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
rotate-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a TextFragment, and explains how to rotate the text by applying a transformation matrix via a Graph object.

apply-background-color-to-text.title: Apply Background Color to Text in PDF
apply-background-color-to-text.description: Shows how to set a background color for a TextFragment using its TextState before adding it to a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

apply-font-size-and-color-to-textfragmen.title: Apply Font Size and Color to TextFragment
apply-font-size-and-color-to-textfragmen.description: Shows how to set the font size and foreground color via TextState and assign the styled TextFragment to a PDF page.

add-text-to-pdf-from-memory-stream.title: Add Text to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
add-text-to-pdf-from-memory-stream.description: The example loads a PDF from a file into a MemoryStream (or creates a new PDF), adds a text fragment at a specified position, and saves the modified document back to a MemoryStream (optionally writing it to a file).

save-modified-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Save Modified PDF to Byte Array
save-modified-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF, adds a simple text annotation, and returns the modified document as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-and-encrypt-pdf.title: Add Text and Encrypt PDF with Password
add-text-and-encrypt-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, adding a text fragment, setting permissions, and encrypting the document with user and owner passwords using AES‑256.

add-underlined-text-to-pdf.title: Add Underlined Text to PDF
add-underlined-text-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a TextFragment, enable underlining via TextState, and save the modified document.

create-strikethrough-text.title: Create Strikethrough Text in PDF
create-strikethrough-text.description: Shows how to apply a strikeout style to a TextFragment by setting TextState.StrikeOut and adding it to a PDF page.

render-superscript-text.title: Render Superscript Text in PDF
render-superscript-text.description: Demonstrates how to display superscript characters in a PDF by using the TextState.Superscript property (or manual rise) with Aspose.Pdf.

render-subscript-text-using-text-rise.title: Render Subscript Text Using Text Rise
render-subscript-text-using-text-rise.description: Demonstrates how to create subscript text by applying a negative text rise before adding a TextFragment and resetting the rise afterward.

set-custom-line-spacing-for-added-text.title: Set Custom Line Spacing for Added Text in PDF
set-custom-line-spacing-for-added-text.description: Demonstrates how to modify the line spacing (leading) of newly added text by configuring a TextState and appending lines with a TextParagraph in an existing PDF document.

adjust-word-spacing-inserted-text.title: Adjust Word Spacing of Inserted Text in PDF
adjust-word-spacing-inserted-text.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a TextFragment, set the TextState.WordSpacing property to control spacing between words, position the text on a page, and save the updated document.

justify-text-in-pdf.title: Justify Text in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
justify-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a TextFragment, and setting its HorizontalAlignment to Justify so the text spans the full page width.

enable-rtl-text-direction.title: Enable Right-to-Left Text Direction in PDF
enable-rtl-text-direction.description: Shows how to set a PDF's reading order to right‑to‑left and add an Arabic text fragment using Aspose.Pdf.

render-bidirectional-text-pdf.title: Render Bidirectional Text in PDF
render-bidirectional-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed right‑to‑left (Arabic) and left‑to‑right (English) text in a PDF using Unicode control characters and configure TextState for proper font and appearance.

set-custom-line-height.title: Set Custom Line Height for PDF Text
set-custom-line-height.description: Shows how to define a custom line height (line spacing) for text in a PDF by configuring the TextState of a TextFragment using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-with-simulated-kerning-to-pdf.title: Add Text with Simulated Kerning to PDF
add-text-with-simulated-kerning-to-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextFragment, sets character spacing to simulate kerning, positions the text on the page, and saves the modified document.

add-text-with-ligatures-to-pdf.title: Add Text with Ligatures to PDF
add-text-with-ligatures-to-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextFragment, sets its font and size, and adds it to a page; ligatures are rendered automatically when the chosen font supports them.

enable-automatic-hyphenation-pdf.title: Enable Automatic Hyphenation When Adding Text to PDF
enable-automatic-hyphenation-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a paragraph into a PDF with automatic hyphenation enabled using Aspose.Pdf's TextState and formatting options.

embed-css-in-htmlfragment.title: Embed CSS in HtmlFragment for Styled PDF Text
embed-css-in-htmlfragment.description: Demonstrates how to embed CSS rules inside an HtmlFragment to control font, color, and spacing when converting HTML to PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-action-to-text-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Action to a PDF Text Annotation
add-javascript-action-to-text-annotation.description: Shows how to create a link annotation, attach a JavaScript action to it, and save the modified PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-internal-goto-link-to-pdf.title: Add Internal GoTo Link to PDF Using TextFragment
add-internal-goto-link-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a clickable text fragment that navigates to a specific page within the same PDF using a LocalHyperlink (GoTo action). The example loads a PDF, ensures the target page exists, adds the linked text, and saves the result.

add-clickable-hyperlink-text-to-pdf.title: Add Clickable Hyperlink Text to PDF
add-clickable-hyperlink-text-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a TextFragment with a TextSegment that contains a web hyperlink and append it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-launch-action-open-file.title: Create PDF with Launch Action to Open External File
create-pdf-launch-action-open-file.description: Shows how to add a clickable text element to a PDF that launches an external file using Aspose.Pdf's LaunchAction.

set-text-opacity-aspdf.title: Set Text Opacity in a PDF
set-text-opacity-aspdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply semi‑transparent color to a TextFragment by configuring its TextState.Transparency (via ARGB) and adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-specific-text-fragment-pdf.title: Rotate Specific Text Fragment in PDF by 45 Degrees
rotate-specific-text-fragment-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF, locate a text fragment with TextFragmentAbsorber, and rotate that fragment by 45 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-rotated-text-second-page.title: Insert Rotated Text on Second PDF Page
insert-rotated-text-second-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder to add a rotated TextFragment to the second page of an existing PDF document.

create-rotated-text-paragraph.title: Create Rotated Text Paragraph with Multiple Fragments
create-rotated-text-paragraph.description: Demonstrates building a TextParagraph with several TextFragments, applying a 30‑degree rotation, and adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-confidential-with-public-in-pdf.title: Replace "Confidential" with "Public" in a PDF
replace-confidential-with-public-in-pdf.description: Shows how to locate a specific phrase in a PDF and replace it with another string using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and related APIs.

extract-email-addresses-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Email Addresses from PDF Pages
extract-email-addresses-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to search each page of a PDF for e‑mail addresses using a regular expression and Aspose.Pdf's text‑fragment absorber, then collects and displays the matches per page.

detect-line-breaks-in-text-fragments.title: Detect Line Breaks in Text Fragments and Apply Color
detect-line-breaks-in-text-fragments.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts all text fragments, splits each fragment into logical lines, identifies manual line‑breaks, and changes the fragment color when a line break is present.

get-line-break-info-from-text-fragment.title: Get Line Break Information from PDF Text Fragments
get-line-break-info-from-text-fragment.description: Demonstrates how to extract line‑break information from each TextFragment on a PDF page using an extension method (fallback for older Aspose.Pdf versions) and logs the fragment details to the console.

append-disclaimer-text-to-first-pdf-page.title: Append Disclaimer Text to First PDF Page
append-disclaimer-text-to-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a disclaimer as a TextFragment to the end of the paragraph collection on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-header-text-fragments.title: Rotate Header Text Fragments in PDFs
rotate-header-text-fragments.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, detects larger‑font text fragments as headers, and rotates those fragments by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-rotate-pages-save-to-memory.title: Replace Text and Rotate Pages, Save PDF to Memory Stream
replace-text-rotate-pages-save-to-memory.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, replacing specific text, rotating each page, and saving the modified document into a memory stream using Aspose.Pdf.

search-text-with-logging-and-modify.title: Search PDF Text with Logging and Uppercase Replacement
search-text-with-logging-and-modify.description: Loads a PDF, searches for a phrase using TextFragmentAbsorber with error logging enabled, converts each found occurrence to uppercase, saves the updated PDF, and writes any extraction errors to a log file.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all page text using TextAbsorber, and write the concatenated result to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

extract-line-break-positions-from-pdf.title: Extract Line Break Positions from PDF
extract-line-break-positions-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, absorb all text fragments, collect unique baseline Y coordinates that represent line breaks, and write those positions to a JSON file.

add-rotated-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-rotated-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder and TextFragment to place a rotated "CONFIDENTIAL" watermark on every page of a PDF document.

replace-text-on-specific-pdf-pages.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Pages
replace-text-on-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to replace a given phrase only within a defined page range of a PDF by iterating pages and using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber.

highlight-keyword-occurrences-pdf.title: Highlight Keyword Occurrences in PDF (Case‑Insensitive)
highlight-keyword-occurrences-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to search for a case‑insensitive keyword in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber with a regular expression and highlight each found instance by setting its background color.

add-rotated-mixed-style-text-paragraph-t.title: Add Rotated Mixed-Style Text Paragraph to PDF Page 3
add-rotated-mixed-style-text-paragraph-t.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextParagraph with mixed font styles, rotates it 45 degrees, and inserts it onto the third page using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-replace-text-in-pdf.title: Batch Replace Text in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
batch-replace-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate over a dictionary of old‑new string pairs, and replace all occurrences of each string using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber.

extract-text-word-count-per-pdf-page.title: Extract Text and Count Words per PDF Page
extract-text-word-count-per-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text of each page, count the words, and write the page‑wise statistics to a CSV file.

rotate-draft-text-fragments.title: Rotate 'Draft' Text Fragments in PDF
rotate-draft-text-fragments.description: Shows how to locate all text fragments containing the word "Draft" with TextFragmentAbsorber and apply a 15‑degree rotation to each fragment in a PDF document.

find-dates-in-pdf-using-regex.title: Find Dates in PDF Using Regex with TextFragmentAbsorber
find-dates-in-pdf-using-regex.description: Demonstrates how to locate all dates in the MM/DD/YYYY format within a PDF by applying a regular‑expression pattern with TextFragmentAbsorber and TextSearchOptions.

append-multiline-textfragment-linebreak-.title: Append Multi‑Line TextFragment and Retrieve Line‑Break Information
append-multiline-textfragment-linebreak-.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi‑line TextFragment to a PDF page and iterate its TextSegment objects to obtain line‑break positions for custom rendering.

rotate-text-in-table-cell.title: Rotate Text in a Table Cell Using TextFragment Rotation
rotate-text-in-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to locate a table cell in a PDF, retrieve its first text fragment, and rotate the text by 60 degrees using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragment.Rotation property.

rotate-pdf-title-text.title: Rotate PDF Title Text by 45 Degrees
rotate-pdf-title-text.description: Shows how to load PDF files, read the document title from metadata, locate each occurrence of that title, rotate the title text by 45 degrees, and save the modified PDFs.

add-rotated-text-bottom-right-last-page.title: Add Rotated Text to Bottom-Right of Last PDF Page
add-rotated-text-bottom-right-last-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder and TextParagraph to place rotated text in a rectangle at the bottom-right corner of the last page of a PDF document.

replace-text-with-clickable-hyperlink.title: Replace Text with Clickable Hyperlink in PDF
replace-text-with-clickable-hyperlink.description: Shows how to search for a phrase in a PDF, replace it with custom link text, and add a clickable hyperlink annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-text-sentences-to-pages.title: Extract PDF Text and Write Each Sentence to Separate Pages
extract-pdf-text-sentences-to-pages.description: The example extracts all text from an input PDF, splits it into individual sentences, and creates a new PDF where each sentence is placed on its own page as a TextFragment.

rotate-text-in-pdf-form-field.title: Rotate Text in a PDF Form Field
rotate-text-in-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to rotate the visual appearance of a text box form field by modifying its rectangle and rebuilding the appearance stream, then saving the updated PDF.

batch-replace-keywords-pdf.title: Batch Replace Keywords in PDF Using a Configuration File
batch-replace-keywords-pdf.description: Shows how to load a CSV mapping of old and new strings and replace multiple keywords on every page of a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

fuzzy-text-search-pdf.title: Fuzzy Text Search in PDF with Levenshtein Distance
fuzzy-text-search-pdf.description: Demonstrates locating approximate matches of a target phrase in a PDF by using Aspose.Pdf's text search and then filtering the results with a Levenshtein distance check.
